view.title: Validate explicit UC need #4

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 4 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of no duplication of business rules per language.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of no duplication of business rules per language.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of having no duplication of business rules per language. However, the evidence provided does not confirm whether this requirement is satisfied, as it primarily discusses the behavior of labels in different languages without addressing the underlying business rules. The linked use case mentions the need for no duplication of business rules but lacks concrete evidence or tests that demonstrate compliance with this requirement, leading to an inconclusive validation.
